title: Suspicious package reported near Old Cabell Hall
description: A suspicious unattended bag was found in the vestibule of Old Cabell Hall. PD is on scene.

title: Minor vehicle collision on Emmet St
description: Two cars collided at the intersection of Emmet St and University Ave. No injuries reported.

title: Medical aid rendered at Corner
description: First responders provided medical aid to a student experiencing severe dehydration near The Corner.

title: Small fire extinguished in dorm kitchen
description: A cooking fire in a dormitory kitchen was quickly contained and extinguished. No injuries.

title: Lost pet reported near the Rotunda
description: A lost service dog was reported near the Rotunda and safely reunited with its owner.
